LAW AND MOTION 301, JUDGE BUSCH MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT HIS WIFE, CATHARINE BARNES, A DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY IS PRESENTLY A MEMBER OF THE TEAM THAT HANDLES GOVERNMENT ISSUES AND COMPLEX CONTRACT SITUATION, SHE DOES NOT NORMALLY HANDLE LITIGATION OF THIS TYPE & NOT INVOLVED IN THIS CASE. HE DOES NOT VIEW HER EMPLOYMENT AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. NO OBJECTIONS WERE MADE. CROSS COMPLAINANT ANGOTTI & REILLY, INCORPORATED'S VERIFIED PETITION FOR ORDER COMPELLING CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION [CCP 1281.2] IS DENIED. THERE IS A RISK OF INCONSISTENCY RULING SO LONG AS SAFECO IS NOT MADE A PARTY TO THE ARBITRATION AND LET THE LITIGATION GO FORWARD. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

Verified Petition For Order Compelling Contractual Arbitration And Notice Of Hearing Thereon [Ccp 1281.2]
Off Calendar Sep-15-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. RICHARD C. STROMBERG, TEL. NO. 453-5400 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. CLARK T. THIEL AND ATTY. ERIC CASHER OF THE HOWREY LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 848-3246 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING - JUDGE BUSCH MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT HIS WIFE, CATHARINE BARNES, A DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY IS PRESENTLY A MEMBER OF THE TEAM THAT HANDLES GOVERNMENT ISSUES AND COMPLEX CONTRACT SITUATION, SHE DOES NOT NORMALLY HANDLE LITIGATION OF THIS TYPE & NOT INVOLVED IN THIS CASE. HE DOES NOT VIEW HER EMPLOYMENT AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. NO OBJECTIONS WERE MADE. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. CROSS COMPLAINANT ANGOTTI & REILLY, INCORPORATED'S Verified Petition For Order Compelling Contractual Arbitration [Ccp 1281.2] IS DENIED. THERE IS A RISK OF INCONSISTENCY RULING SO LONG AS SAFECO IS NOT MADE A PARTY TO THE ARBITRATION AND LET THE LITIGATION GO FORWARD. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
